usage: generateRCFactor [-help] [-outputFile <string>] [-postroute {low medium}] [-preroute {true false}] [-reference {low medium high signoff externalSpef}] [-spefMapFile <string>] [-useSameRouting {true false}] [-use_ostrich_filters <string>]

options.name: -outputFile
options.description: Specifies file name to save new RC factor setting

options.name: -postroute
options.description: Generates scale factor for postRoute extraction

options.name: -preroute
options.description: Generates scale factor for preRoute extraction

options.name: -reference
options.description: {low medium high signoff externalSpef} Specifies engine/external spef for comparison

options.name: -spefMapFile
options.description: Specifies spef map file for comparison in MMMC designs

options.name: -useSameRouting
options.description: Specifies to use same routed db when generating spefs

options.name: -use_ostrich_filters
options.description: Specifies file name containing ostrich data filters
